title: Berachain Intelligence
body: Analyse Berachain PoL validators, BGT emissions, and liquidity incentive flows.

title: Block Explorer Toolkit
body: Fetch block details, all transactions in a block, and decode individual transactions — all the building blocks for a custom block explorer.

title: Carbon Credit and Regen Tracker
body: Track tokenized carbon credits, retirements, and regenerative finance flows onchain.

title: Chain Activity Dashboard
body: Compare transactions, active addresses, and contract deployments across chains.

title: Chain Health Scorecard
body: Score any EVM chain on activity, growth, and decentralisation metrics in real time.

title: Contract Event Log Monitor
body: Stream all decoded event logs emitted by any smart contract — filter by topic hash, date, or block range. The foundation for DEX analytics, protocol dashboards, and real-time monitoring.

title: Cosmos Ecosystem (Unified)
body: Unified analytics across IBC-connected Cosmos chains — balances, staking, and governance.

title: Cross-Border Payment Analytics
body: Analyse stablecoin and crypto cross-border payment corridors, volume, and velocity.

title: Cross-Contract Event Scanner
body: Scan ALL contracts on a chain for a specific event by topic hash — e.g. find every ERC-20 Transfer or every Uniswap Swap across the entire chain.

title: DAO Voter Intelligence
body: Analyse governance participation, delegate power, and voting patterns for any DAO.

title: Developer Wallet Classifier
body: Classify wallets as developer, trader, bot, or retail based on onchain interaction patterns.

title: Ethereum Validator Intelligence
body: Track ETH staking validators, rewards, slashing events, and withdrawal activity.

title: Event Log Decoder
body: Decode and search contract event logs across any block range and chain.

title: Fund Flow Intelligence
body: Trace fund flows, hops, and wallet clusters to map capital movement onchain.

title: Gas Analytics
body: Real-time and historical gas price tracking for any EVM-compatible chain.

title: Hyperliquid Intelligence
body: Deep onchain analytics for Hyperliquid — perp traders, vault flows, and market maker activity.

title: Institutional Wallet Tracker
body: Monitor large-wallet movements and institutional-grade position changes across chains.

title: Macro Onchain Sentiment
body: Aggregate stablecoin flows, whale movements, and DEX volume as a macro sentiment index.

title: NEAR Protocol Intelligence
body: Analytics for NEAR accounts — contract calls, FT/NFT holdings, and staking rewards.

title: Onchain Credit Score
body: Generate a credit-risk score for any wallet based on transaction history, assets, and repayment behaviour.

title: Onchain Data Query
body: Query indexed blockchain data across 100+ chains with a single unified API.

title: Polkadot Parachain Intelligence
body: Analytics across Polkadot parachains — XCM transfers, staking, and cross-chain balances.

title: Protocol Acquisition Intelligence
body: Detect early signals of protocol acquisitions via treasury movements, governance changes, and token flows.

title: Scroll and Linea Intelligence
body: Unified analytics for Scroll and Linea zkEVM — user growth, bridge flows, and DeFi activity.

title: Solana Program Analytics
body: Analyse Solana program interactions, user growth, and transaction volume.

title: StarkNet Intelligence
body: Analytics for StarkNet wallets — Cairo contract interactions, token balances, and gas usage.

title: Sui and Aptos Intelligence
body: Unified analytics for Sui and Aptos Move-based chains — objects, coins, and transactions.

title: Token Price History
body: Fetch historical spot prices and OHLCV data for any ERC-20 token onchain.

title: TON Blockchain Intelligence
body: Analytics for The Open Network — Jetton transfers, NFT activity, and wallet analytics.

title: Treasury Management Intelligence
body: Analyse DAO or protocol treasury composition, diversification, and spending velocity.

title: Tron Ecosystem Monitor
body: Monitor USDT flows, DeFi activity, and wallet behaviour on the Tron network.

title: Wallet Activity Heatmap
body: Generate a GitHub-style activity heatmap showing daily transaction counts for any wallet — visualize on-chain behaviour patterns.
